_frame: After EAT: the original bug guard. Ungrammatical follow-ons (feelings, yes/no, question words) must NOT glow. A food item and 'more' should be reachable. We do NOT assert hungry/done here: the model rightly rates them low because FOOD follows 'eat' (you are hungry THEN eat; 'done' is a separate utterance).
After DRINK: water reachable; feelings/questions suppressed.

After WANT (transitive light verb): feelings/responses/social/questions cannot follow it. btn_bathroom is a clinical pin (BCBA: a top child 'want'); must_gold guards that the proposals.json override survives a rebuild (the model alone rates it only ~0.67).
After I (clause start): bare yes/no and question words should not be the suggestion.
After GO: a place is reachable; feelings/responses suppressed. Anchored on go->home (robust in every locale); go->outside is a weaker, model-dependent association and is not asserted.
